text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":true,"within_length":true,"justification":"It mirrors the user's details (Markets tab, iPhone 14, iOS 26.4, post-update/reinstall), asks for build and error info, and states that engineering will be looped in next without inventing policies and stays concise, but it promises that engineering will follow up (an unverifiable outcome) and omits the gold-note workaround/thanks (though not contradictory)."}
